steps.title: Add the equations to find 8y
steps.content:
Add both equations to eliminate $x$:
$(15x + 32y) + (-15x + 32y) = 16 + 16$
$64y = 32$
$y = \frac{1}{2}$, so $8y = 4$.

steps.title: Subtract the equations to find 3x
steps.content:
Subtract the second equation from the first to eliminate $y$:
$(15x + 32y) - (-15x + 32y) = 16 - 16$
$30x = 0$
$x = 0$, so $3x = 0$.
